occurrence_sentence: "This new funding will be used to expand our talented team in Australia and launch in the U.S. as well as capitalise on our existing international partnerships," said Andrew Dzurak, CEO and founder of Diraq.

"This new funding will be used to expand our talented team in Australia and launch in the U.S. as well as capitalise on our existing international partnerships," said Andrew Dzurak, CEO and founder of Diraq.

"We are excited to lead Diraq's Series A-2 round as the company continues to evolve as a key player in the global silicon quantum ecosystem," said Will Zeng, a Quantonation partner who will join Diraq's board.
